# Booker Accounting & Consulting
> Accounting, bookkeeping, corporate tax, VAT advisory, AML compliance,
> and audit services in Dubai, UAE. FTA-approved tax agent.
> Zoho authorized partner.
 
## Services
- Accounting & Bookkeeping: https://www.bookeraccounting.com/accounting-bookkeeping
- Corporate Tax & VAT: https://www.bookeraccounting.com/taxation
- Audit & Assurance: https://www.bookeraccounting.com/audit-assurance
- AML Compliance: https://www.bookeraccounting.com/aml
- Business Advisory: https://www.bookeraccounting.com/business-advisory
- Business Support / Company Formation: https://www.bookeraccounting.com/business-support
